# osdgoogle_versions (Data Source)

List of available OpenShift versions for OSD.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) List of versions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Version ID (e.g., openshift-v4.16.1).
- `name` (String) Short name (e.g., 4.16.1).
